acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params.initialLiquidationPenaltyBps: Global liquidation penalty in basis points.
params.initialMaxCoverageRatioBps: Maximum insurance coverage ratio in basis points.
params.initialOwner: The governance owner with permission to update risk parameters.
params.initialPremiumTreasuryBps: Premium share routed to treasury in basis points.
params.initialQuoteSigner: Authorized signer for off-chain insurance quotes.
params.initialVaultUtilizationLimitBps: Max vault utilization allowed in basis points.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.maxCoverageRatioBps_: Max coverage ratio for this tier.

params.activationDelay: Delay before insurance starts scaling in.
params.fullActivationDelay: Delay when full coverage is reached.
params.minHoldingTime: Min holding seconds before claim eligibility.

params.newMaxCoverageRatioBps: Maximum coverage ratio in basis points.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner.

activationDelayByMarket(bytes32).notice: Returns activation delay for staged coverage in a market.

constructor.notice: Deploys the RiskConfig with an initial owner and global risk parameters.

cooldownSecondsByTier(uint8).notice: Returns claim cooldown duration for a tier.

fullActivationDelayByMarket(bytes32).notice: Returns full activation delay for staged coverage in a market.

getGlobalParams().notice: Returns all global risk parameters used by insurance and liquidation modules.

liquidationGracePeriodSeconds().notice: Returns liquidation grace period in seconds for insured positions.

liquidationPenaltyBps().notice: Returns the global liquidation penalty (in bps).

maxCoverageRatioBps().notice: Returns the maximum insurance coverage ratio (in bps).

maxCoverageRatioByTier(uint8).notice: Returns max coverage ratio for a tier. Falls back to global cap when not set.

minHoldingTimeByMarket(bytes32).notice: Returns minimum holding time required for claims in a market.

premiumTreasuryBps().notice: Returns the premium share that routes to treasury (in bps).

quoteSigner().notice: Returns the authorized off-chain quote signer.

setCoverageTier(uint8,uint256).notice: Sets coverage cap by user tier.

setLiquidationGracePeriodSeconds(uint256.notice: Updates the liquidation grace period granted to insured positions before forced liquidation.

setMarketConfig(bytes32,(bool,address,ad.notice: Creates or updates market-level risk configuration.

utilizationThrottleBps().notice: Returns dynamic utilization throttle for accepting new coverage.

vaultUtilizationLimitBps().notice: Returns the maximum vault utilization limit (in bps).
